domain_pack_selection_reason: The claim tests generic provenance invariants only.
mode_rule: Audit mode requires source, claim, review, and release-integrity gates.
decision_rationale: Use one local snapshot and one external deterministic reviewer to exercise every release binding without specialty assumptions.

team_spawn_plan.rationale: Single-claim fixture does not require a team DAG.

post_team_audit_plan: Run all release validators and compare every referenced hash.
